com.bfo.json.CborWriter

    Methods in com.bfo.json that return CborWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CborWriter
    CborWriter.setOutput(OutputStream out)
    Set the OutputStream to write to
    CborWriter
    CborWriter.setOutput(ByteBuffer buf)
    Set the ByteBuffer to write to
    CborWriter
    CborWriter.setReduceDecimals(boolean reduce)
    Request that floating-point values (doubles, floats) are reduced in precision to 32 or 16 bit values if this can be done without any loss.
    CborWriter
    CborWriter.setSorted(boolean sorted)
    Request that map keys are sorted before writing.
